_note: Real ADEME Base Carbone V23.6 values (kgCO2e). Transport: car/motorcycle in kgCO2e/km (per vehicle, per_vehicle=true); public transport/flight/ferry in kgCO2e/passenger-km (per person). Spend: kgCO2e/EUR (2023, excl. VAT). All values are full life-cycle (manufacturing + upstream + fuel). Electric vehicles are based on the French grid (low-carbon); real impact on the Turkish grid is higher. Items with 'needs_review:true' are proxy/estimated values that have no direct ADEME row. 'category' is used for the iOS picker grouping; transit modes use 'public_transport'.

transport.label: Car - Petrol (Small)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, entry segment, mild-hybrid petrol

transport.label: Car - Petrol (Medium)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, mid segment (compact), mild-hybrid petrol

transport.label: Car/SUV - Petrol (Large)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, premium segment, mild-hybrid petrol

transport.label: Car - Diesel (Small)
transport.ademe: Derived: petrol-small x compact diesel/petrol ratio (0.935); no ADEME small-diesel row

transport.label: Car - Diesel (Medium)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, mid segment (compact), mild-hybrid diesel

transport.label: Car/SUV - Diesel (Large)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, premium segment, mild-hybrid diesel

transport.label: Car - Hybrid (Medium)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, mid segment (compact), full hybrid (Prius)

transport.label: Car - Plug-in Hybrid (Medium)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, mid segment (compact), plug-in hybrid

transport.label: Car - Electric (Small)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, entry segment, electric (FR grid)

transport.label: Car - Electric (Medium)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, mid segment (compact), electric (FR grid)

transport.label: Car/SUV - Electric (Large)
transport.ademe: Passenger car, premium segment, electric (FR grid)

transport.label: Motorcycle (Small)
transport.ademe: Two-wheeler, scooter, mixed

transport.label: Motorcycle (Medium)
transport.ademe: Interpolated midpoint of small (0.085) and large (0.217); no ADEME medium two-wheeler class

transport.label: Motorcycle (Large)
transport.ademe: Two-wheeler, motorcycle, mixed

transport.label: Bus (City)
transport.ademe: City bus fleet-average, agglomeration >250k (kgCO2e/passenger-km)

transport.label: Coach (Intercity)
transport.ademe: Intercity coach, diesel - ADEME 'Autocar gazole' row. Value may reflect lower-occupancy scenario; confirm against V23.6 CSV before release.

transport.label: Train - High-speed
transport.ademe: High-speed rail (TGV), FR (kgCO2e/passenger-km)

transport.label: Train - Regional
transport.ademe: Regional train (TER), FR 2022 (kgCO2e/passenger-km)

transport.label: Metro / Tram
transport.ademe: Metro/tram/RER, FR 2022 (kgCO2e/passenger-km)

transport.label: Flight - Short-haul (Economy)
transport.ademe: Aircraft 101-220 seats, 1000-2000km, incl. contrails/RF (kgCO2e/passenger-km)

transport.label: Flight - Short-haul (Business)
transport.ademe: ADEME has no cabin-class split; economy x1.5 (DEFRA short-haul business default)

transport.label: Flight - Long-haul (Economy)
transport.ademe: Aircraft >220 seats, >5000km, incl. contrails/RF (kgCO2e/passenger-km)

transport.label: Flight - Long-haul (Business)
transport.ademe: ADEME has no cabin-class split; economy x2.0 (DEFRA long-haul business default)

transport.label: Ferry
transport.ademe: Only generic ADEME ferry row (Navette fluviale, 2009 vintage), kgCO2e/passenger-km

transport.label: E-bike
transport.ademe: Electrically assisted bicycle

spend.label: Fuel & Energy
spend.ademe: Covers vehicle pump fuel (petrol/diesel) and household energy bills. No direct ADEME monetary ratio; manual estimate ~1.5 kgCO2e/EUR. Confirm before release.

spend.label: Accommodation / Hotel
spend.ademe: Accommodation & food services 2023 (same code as restaurant)

spend.label: Transport Services
spend.ademe: Land transport & transport via pipelines 2023 (excl. VAT)
